text: The fee for an application of an escort certificate shall be forty dollars which shall be deposited in the general fund.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 5
#### Article 21
##### § 548 — Fees

The fee for an application of an escort certificate shall be forty dollars which shall be deposited in the general fund.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: The fee for an application of an escort certificate shall be forty dollars which shall be deposited in the general fund.
